label: Vespera Tertius
description: Vespera Tertius is a rift-shadowed world orbiting within the Gloamreach System, its nightside permanently washed in bruise-colored auroral glare cast by the empyrean-stained void. The planet’s surface is dominated by basaltic plateaus, glassy impact fields, and ash-choked basins where electrostatic storms scrape the horizon with violet lightning. Orbital space remains cluttered by neglected Imperial infrastructure and drifting wreckage, forcing approach vectors into narrow, beacon-marked corridors. Vox propagation across the world suffers constant interference, and long-range transmissions fracture into delayed, corrupted fragments as a fixed condition of its atmosphere and orbit.
